name: 22" Round Metal Outdoor Column Fire Pit - Threshold™
description:
The Round Metal Outdoor Fire Column from Threshold™ brings cozy comfort to your outdoor space. Made from heat-resistant metal, this round outdoor fire column features a control knob for adjusting the flame, while the side cutout handles allow for portability. Featuring a sleek design and a tall silhouette in a matte black finish, this outdoor fire column adds modern flair to your open-air seating space, while helping you stay comfy as you enjoy your stay under the stars.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
